items.title: Lock down or remove unauthenticated agent status lookup
items.description:
## Summary
`GET /agents/{agent_id}/status` currently has no auth dependency, which means anyone with a UUID can read agent status, heartbeat timing, and uptime data.

## Why This Matters
- runtime/sta

items.title: Enforce queue health and Codex review handoff in autonomy tooling
items.description:
## Summary
The repo contract says queue health must stay non-empty and every PR should get an `@codex please review` comment, but the current autonomy tooling mostly summarizes state instead of enforc
